title: 🏷️ GAMING PLATFORM
data_structure:
```
[
    {
        name: 'name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'PlayStation 5',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'release_year',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 2020,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'manufacturer',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'Sony',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
]
```
